text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's lunchtime. I head to a diner that's<n>having an
all-you-can-eat special.<n>There, I see...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Inari, stop! Stop! You gotta think<n>carefully 'bout
what to eat first!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whaddaya mean? I'm going to start<n>with Inari
sushi since it's my favorite,<n>obviously.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Soaked in broth until it's soft and<n>juicy—the pride
and joy of Edo!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You can like it all ya want, but this is a<n>buffet,
yeah? You gotta get your<n>money's worth!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Here's my winning strategy. Beef,<n>pork, chicken!
Beef, pork, chicken!<n>Throw the curry on the
ground! Okay,<n>now you try.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Beef, pork, chicken! Beef, pork,<n>chicken! Throw
the curry out the<n>window!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ehhh, a little off but ya got the idea.<n>Now, first up is
beef.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hold up, Tama. Your way of life is all<n>messed up.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ya need to live life to the fullest. Who<n>cares about
the price? Eat what ya<n>wanna eat, that's the Edo
way.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You're so small-minded! Just like<n>your body!
Wahaha!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're da last person I wanna hear<n>da word
"small" from!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Can I... can I really do that though?<n>Just eat
whatever I want without<n>worryin' 'bout the bill?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You bet your tail you can! Stop gettin'<n>bogged
down by all these rules!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
We're small enough as it is. If we<n>stay
small-minded too, we'll never be<n>able to win
against the big dogs!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Is that how it works? I dunno...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But you might be on to somethin'.<n>Guess I've
been holdin' myself back<n>without even realizing it.
In that case...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the advice, Inari! I'mma<n>show you my
true self here at this<n>buffet!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Look at this haul! Now this is what Ireally wanted to eat!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya think? Jelly, cake, pudding,<n>and fruit!
Four layers of dessert!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Uh, what? I'm glad you're lettin'<n>loose a bit, but...
only desserts?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I can't help it! I grew up poor, so I<n>never got to eat
any of this stuff<n>when I was a kid!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I guess sometimes it's better<n>to stop
countin' pennies and just live<n>a little!
